description: Developed a client-facing responsive web application in React for management of projects, including a visualizer for 3D scanning. Also lead a massive refactor of the application that reduced codebase size by 40%.

Built a responsive end-to-end services that aggregated food donations from over 10 food support organizations using React, ChakraUI, Redux, NodeJS, DynamoDB and AWS Lambda, displayed in a responsive site with filtration and sorting capabilities
